news.headline: PranaX Corporation licenses exosome technology from MD Anderson Cancer Center to develop exosomes for commercial use.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, PranaX Corporation, a regenerative medicine biotechnology company, revealed the acquisition of exosome technology from The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center. This move aims to advance the development of exosomes for commercial applications. The company's website is www.pranax.com.

news.headline: Sisram Medical will reveal FY 2024 financial results on March 19 and host a conference call on March 20 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Mark your calendars for the conference call on March 20, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Sisram Medical Ltd ("Sisram"), listed as 1696.HK, will hold the call in Hong Kong. The company, along with its subsidiaries, is a global consumer wellness group.

Warren urges ethics inquiry on Tesla White House event.

US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We are trying to get tax bill done and controlling expenses.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I am confident Trump tax bill is on track.
WBBA releases Net5.5G deployment guide at MWC Barcelona, focusing on smarter broadband. #WBBA #Net5.5G #MWCBarcelona
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain, on March 13, 2025, the World Broadband Association (WBBA) organized an industry summit at MWC Barcelona 2025 with the theme "Smarter Broadband: Investment. Innovation. Intelligence." During the event, the WBBA, alongside other industry groups, unveiled the Net5.5G Best Practices, focusing on advancements in broadband technology and strategies for enhancing connectivity.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Detox is not a euphemism for recession.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Companies are generally supportive of transition away from government spending.
Wysa and April Health merge to integrate AI-driven mental health support into primary care, improving accessibility and reducing wait times.
news.summary: A merger between Wysa and April Health in New York has been announced, bringing together their AI-driven mental health support services to integrate into primary care. This collaboration aims to improve accessibility to mental health resources and reduce wait times for patients seeking care. The integration of these technologies will potentially benefit a large number of individuals seeking mental health support in the primary care setting.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Aside from metals and likely autos, everything else is up for grabs for tariff negotiations.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: If trading partners want to ratchet things up, surplus countries will take the biggest hit.
Electrolit named hydration sponsor of LA Marathon through 2029, supporting runners and community well-being.
news.summary: Electrolit, a leading hydration brand, has revealed its ongoing collaboration with the Los Angeles Marathon presented by... The partnership aims to fuel runners and promote community well-being for an extended period. The renowned premium hydration beverage will continue its support to the marathon, solidifying its commitment to the event and its participants. This initiative signifies Electrolit's dedication to enhancing the athletic performance and hydration needs of runners, underlining its role in promoting overall well-being.

news.headline: K Friese + Associates appoints Mason Liebau as Director of Strategic Growth for Water Practice in Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 13, 2025, K Friese + Associates, a Lochner Company, welcomed Mason Liebau, PE, SIT, CFM as the new Director of Strategic Growth for their Water Practice in Texas. Based in San Antonio, Liebau will be instrumental in driving growth and development for the firm in this sector.

news.headline: XRP spikes 4% as Ripple gains approval to offer crypto payments in Dubai. Ripple authorized by DFSA for regulated payments in DIFC, UAE, handling over $400 billion in trade. 64% of financial leaders see blockchain as an advantage for cross-border transactions. Ripple serves 20% of global clients in ME, with 82% of ME financial executives confident in adopting blockchain tech.
news.summary: Ripple has received authorization from the DFSA to offer regulated cryptocurrency payment services in the DIFC in Dubai. This makes Ripple the first entity in the region to achieve this status. The approval allows Ripple to provide its compliance-focused payment platform to UAE businesses, operating in a country conducting over $400 billion in international trade annually. A 2024 survey by Ripple found that 64% of financial leaders in the Middle East and Africa see faster payment processing and settlement as the main benefit of blockchain-based currencies for cross-border transactions. Ripple, with regional headquarters in DIFC since 2020, already serves 20% of its global clients in the Middle East, where 82% of financial executives are highly confident in adopting blockchain technologies.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent when asked about Trump's threatened 200% tariff on EU alcohol: I am not sure why one or two items from one or two trading blocks is a big deal.
Atlassian Williams Racing partners with Brillio for global digital transformation ahead of 2025 FIA Formula 1 with multi-year commitment.
news.summary: At the start of the 2025 FIA Formula 1 World Championship season in Melbourne this weekend, Atlassian Williams Racing has revealed a significant multi-year collaboration with Brillio, a renowned global technology consulting company. This partnership signifies a strategic move for the racing team as they gear up for the upcoming races.

news.headline: Clarifai's AI Orchestration Platform now available on AWS Marketplace, expanding reach to more users.
news.summary: Today, Clarifai, a prominent AI company, revealed that its AI Orchestration Platform will now be available on AWS Marketplace. This significant move comes as Clarifai continues to lead in the AI sector, offering a comprehensive AI platform. The announcement was made in Washington on March 13, 2025. This development signifies increased accessibility as users can now leverage Clarifai's orchestration platform through the AWS platform.

news.headline: MATELASER launches X1 Performance, a portable high-energy laser therapy system for pain management.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated March 13, 2025, Matelaser Inc. revealed the introduction of the X1 Performance, a cutting-edge portable high-energy laser therapy system. This system, aimed at top-tier pain management, aligns with stringent U.S. medical quality benchmarks. Matelaser Inc. underscores its commitment to advancing laser therapy technology, marking a noteworthy development in the medical field.

news.headline: Sadiaa Black Beauty Guide to host panel on legacy building for Black beauty brands at IBS NYC amid industry shifts and reduced DEI efforts by major retailers.
news.summary: In New York on March 13, 2025, the beauty industry is experiencing changes as prominent retailers reduce their efforts towards diversity, equity, and inclusion. This shift highlights the growing importance of independent growth within the Black beauty sector. Sadiaa Black Beauty Guide is taking proactive steps to address this need by organizing initiatives to support and promote Black beauty.

news.headline: BJ Energy Solutions, LLC receives fifth set of TITAN Hydraulic Fracturing Units from Jereh Energy; March 13, 2025.
news.summary: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, BJ Energy Solutions, LLC, recently disclosed that they have acquired a fifth set of their unique TITANTM Natural Gas Fueled Direct Drive Turbine Fracturing Units from Jereh Energy Equipment. This development occurred on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Global geospatial analytics market to reach $55.75 billion by 2029 from $32.97 billion in 2024, with various sectors benefiting.
news.summary: A report on the Geospatial Analytics Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is expected to witness significant growth, with projections indicating an increase from USD 32.97 billion in 2024 to USD 55.75 billion by 2029. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) within this period. The report covers various aspects of the market including software types (such as Geocoding, Thematic Mapping, ETL, Spatial Data), technologies (Sensors, LiDAR, Radar, GPR, EML, GNSS, GIS, ML), data types (Raster Data, Vector Data, 3D Data, Tabular Data), and verticals.

news.headline: Sysdig appoints Gary Olson as CRO and Crendal Kear as CBO after 337% growth in Sysdig Sage usage.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sysdig, a top provider of real-time cloud security, has named Gary Olson as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) and Crendal Kear as Chief Business Officer (CBO) in response to a significant 337% surge in Sysdig Sage™ user adoption in just eight months. Sysdig Sage, known as the first AI cloud security analyst with autonomous capabilities, employs multi-step reasoning and contextual awareness to aid security personnel in identifying, comprehending, and resolving issues effectively.

news.headline: YOSHIKI to perform U.S. & Japanese anthems at 2025 MLB Opening Day in Tokyo. Global icon returns post neck surgery.
news.summary: After undergoing neck surgery, the world-famous artist YOSHIKI has made a remarkable comeback and will be performing for Major League Baseball (MLB) at the beginning of the historic 2025 season in Tokyo. This iconic event highlights an exceptional season kickoff.

news.headline: KS&R appoints Christine Nelson to Executive Committee, enhancing leadership for growth & innovation. - Syracuse, NY on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Syracuse, New York, March 13, 2025 - KS&R, a top strategic consultancy and marketing research firm, is enhancing its long-term growth and innovation by expanding its strategic leadership team. Christine Nelson has been appointed to the Executive Committee. This move is geared towards strengthening the company's direction and fostering innovation.

news.headline: T-Mobile, Thales, and SIMPL partner for secure IoT deployments, addressing challenges with a flexible solution.
news.summary: In MEUDON, France, an important partnership has been formed between T-Mobile, Thales, and SIMPL IoT to revolutionize device management in the expansive IoT market. This collaboration aims to address the challenges faced in managing extensive IoT deployments with various device configurations, focusing on security, simplicity, and connectivity. With the increasing importance of seamless connectivity in IoT operations, this strategic alliance is poised to offer a secure end-to-end solution for IoT players, enhancing operational efficiency. This collaboration is expected to bring substantial advancements in device management within the IoT sector, catering to the growing demands for connectivity.

news.headline: Facteus introduces Onyx dataset with $400B potential value, covering 5 years of transactions across 138 tickers and 20,000+ store locations.
news.summary: Access a reliable advantage with the swiftest and most reliable SKU-level transaction dataset, encapsulating five years of transactions across 138 tickers and over 20,000 store locations. Facteus, a prominent provider of consumer transaction data and insights, made this announcement from Portland, Oregon, on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Contentnea Health in North Carolina partners with eClinicalWorks for cloud EHR system, aimed at streamlining workflows at health centers. 35-provider Federally Qualified Health Center chooses eClinicalWorks for medical, dental, behavioral health, vision, and UDS+ needs.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks revealed that Contentnea Health will implement its cloud-based EHR system to enhance efficiencies within their health centers. Contentnea Health, a North Carolina FQHC with 35 providers, opted for eClinicalWorks for its comprehensive solution tailored to the diverse requirements of health centers, such as medical, dental, behavioral health, vision, and UDS+. By utilizing the AI-driven EHR system, Contentnea Health aims to streamline their workflows effectively.

news.headline: Shaquille O'Neal invests in BeatBox Beverages, launching exclusive Blueberry Lemonade nationwide.
news.summary: A new Blueberry Lemonade flavor has been released nationwide in partnership with basketball legend and entertainer Shaquille O'Neal. The product launch took place in Austin, Texas on March 13, 2025. Shaquille O'Neal, known for his basketball career and entertainment ventures, collaborated with BeatBox Beverages to introduce this exclusive product to consumers across the country.

news.headline: Talkdesk introduces After Hours to extend sales/service beyond business hours, enhancing customer & agent happiness.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Talkdesk is assisting companies in expanding their sales and customer service to cater to customers outside regular business hours with Talkdesk After Hours. This initiative by #AgenticAI aims to enhance customer support beyond the conventional operating hours and improve overall customer experience.

news.headline: Paige launches AI app for GI tract diagnosis. Paige GI Suite assists in detecting common conditions, covering all regions.
news.summary: A new AI-assisted diagnostic application, the Paige GI Suite, has been introduced by Paige, a leading next-gen AI technology company. This tool is specifically designed to aid pathologists in identifying prevalent conditions within the gastrointestinal (GI) tract. In contrast to other AI solutions concentrating on one tissue type, the Paige GI Suite offers a holistic approach, allowing AI-assisted examination of biopsies from any part of the GI tract. This cutting-edge solution is set to revolutionize the detection process with its comprehensive system-wide capabilities.

news.headline: Donny Osmond extends Harrah's Las Vegas residency through Nov 2025, incorporating AI technology for unique concert experience.
news.summary: Renowned musician Donny Osmond has confirmed the continuation of his successful residency at Harrah’s Showroom in Las Vegas until November 2025. As part of his show, Osmond has embraced a progressive technology trend by utilizing his Artificial Intelligence (AI) likeness to enhance the live concert experience for audiences. This innovative approach aims to provide fans with a unique and unforgettable performance. The extension of Osmond's residency showcases his ongoing popularity and success in the entertainment industry.

news.headline: Intrepid Fiber Networks starts construction for fiber broadband in Superior, CO offering multi-gigabit speeds to revolutionize digital infrastructure.
news.summary: Intrepid Fiber Networks recently marked the start of construction on its open-access fiber broadband network in Superior, Colorado, with a groundbreaking ceremony. This initiative promises to bring symmetrical, multi-gigabit internet speeds to residents and businesses, elevating the city's digital infrastructure and catering to future broadband needs. The project is set to connect a large portion of Superior's population, demonstrating a significant leap in the city's technological advancement.

news.headline: Real Time Medical Systems to present at PALTC25 on value-based care strategies; Founder Dr. Scott Rifkin to speak on March 13-15, 2025 in Charlotte, NC.
news.summary: Real Time Medical Systems (Real Time) shared that its founder and Executive Chairman, Dr. Scott Rifkin, is scheduled to speak at the Post-Acute Long-Term Care (PALTC) 2025 Annual Conference in Charlotte, NC from March 13-15, 2025. Real Time is known for being industry-leading, KLAS Rated, and HITRUST Certified in post-acute analytics solutions. This conference aims to bring together industry leaders, medical directors, and healthcare professionals to discuss staying updated on clinical quality standards and discovering cutting-edge advancements.

news.headline: Michael McGuire appointed President of XR Pay, a division of XR, specializing in finance solutions for advertising and entertainment.
news.summary: XR, a leading global technology company, has appointed Michael McGuire as the President of XR Pay, a specialized division offering full payroll and financial services for the advertising and entertainment sectors. McGuire's primary responsibility will be spearheading the growth of XR Pay by refining production finance and improving payroll services to support business development and ensure client satisfaction. With a vast experience exceeding 25 years in enterprise hardware, software, and services, McGuire is well-positioned to steer XR Pay towards success.

news.headline: Northwind Midstream expands gas system in NM with 150 MMcf/d treating capacity, 200 miles of pipelines, and 41,750hp compression.
news.summary: In Houston, Northwind Midstream Partners LLC unveiled the completion and operation of a significant infrastructure project. The company has successfully built and activated 150 million cubic feet per day (MMcf/d) of high-circulation amine treating capacity. Additionally, they have established two acid-gas disposal and carbon sequestration wells, laid down over 200 miles of large-diameter pipelines, and installed 41,750 horsepower of compression distributed among five compressor stations. This extensive system development by Northwind has been supported by enduring agreements and commitments, with a substantial backing of greater than 165,000.

news.headline: Mobeus introduces "tele" to bridge gap between AI agents and consumer adoption, addressing disappointing adoption rates.
news.summary: In Sparta, New Jersey, AI agents are advancing at a rapid pace, becoming more specialized and integrated. However, a gap in consumer interaction is emerging as their capabilities grow, leading to low adoption rates, unsuccessful business implementations, and missed ROI opportunities. Addressing this issue, Mobeus has unveiled the "tele," an innovative consumer-friendly agentic user interface. The tele aims to bridge the existing divide, offering an intuitive solution for seamless interaction with AI agents. This development comes as a response to the need for easier engagement with these advanced systems.

news.headline: American Water promotes digital options for customer account management; offers MyWater, a self-service portal for easy access.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the U.S., emphasizes the convenience for customers to handle their accounts and access information 24/7 through the online self-service customer portal, MyWater, and the company's website. The main focus for American Water is on providing safe, clean, reliable, and cost-effective water and wastewater services to its customers.
